note: v0.5.0 - hand-drawn --style sketch axis (rough shapes, open arrowheads, bundled Kalam handwriting font) across flowchart + sequence/class/state, every output, deterministic and zero-network, composing with any theme. Single-member entry. No before/ set (no plan-time baseline was drawn).

diagrams.title: sketch-style: As-built sketch pipeline: --style axis → src/rough + Kalam font → svg / native / runtime (parity) → SVG/PNG/HTML
sketch-style: As-built structure: src/rough source of truth mirrored into vnmRuntime + reused by the native sketch-svg helper; sketch-font embedded
sketch-style: A --style sketch render call: renderer → seeded rough gen + embedded font → hand-drawn output (PNG via resvg, HTML via the inlined runtime)
